681809029.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
681809029.transcript: You should be proud of yourself, Io.

jp.literal: That was a great job, Io!

683173618.label: PL1100_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL0900
683173618.transcript: You've become a steadfast ally, Vane.

jp.text: 頼もしくなったな、ヴェイン。
jp.literal: You've become quite a pain, Vane.

683218404.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
683218404.transcript: Well, I'll give you a chance to humble me during the next round.

jp.text: 問題ない。次に備えるぞ。
jp.literal: No problem. Let's prepare for the next one.

693547407.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
693547407.transcript: We've come so far. This is it, everyone!

jp.text: 俺たちの全てをこの戦いにぶつけるんだ！
jp.literal: I'll throw everything we've got into this fight!

695698714.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
695698714.transcript: I am very proud of you.

696676700.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
696676700.transcript: Let's not singe our armor in the process next time, hm?

jp.text: あまり熱くなりすぎないようにな

697548487.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
697548487.transcript: I am your humble servant, Queen of Roses.

jp.text: 光栄です、薔薇の女王様。

698222829.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
698222829.transcript: Now how will you respond, primal of howling wind?

jp.text: 風を纏いし聖将軍。どれほどの相手か。
jp.literal: Wind-swathed, I'll show you what I'm made of. How many opponents are you?

698567362.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
698567362.transcript: You've a level head on your shoulders.

jp.text: お前たち、油断はするなよ
お前ら、見せ場は俺のものだ！
jp.literal: I won't let you get away! Iris!

700566532.label: PL1102_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL0800_2
700566532.transcript: Rely on your allies a little more.

702492863.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
702492863.transcript: I'd say you'll be keeping me company very soon.

jp.text: さあ、次は俺に合わせてみろ
jp.literal: Alright, now try to keep up with me.

703545704.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
703545704.transcript: You must ask your pack to take a bow as well.

jp.text: フェリとペットたちのおかげだな
jp.literal: Thanks to you and the pets.

jp.text: 存分に暴れるとするか！

707894253.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
707894253.transcript: I should ask the same of your spearwork.

jp.text: ゼタの掃除術こそ相当なものだと思うぞ
jp.literal: I'd say Zeta's skill is quite something.

709253109.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
709253109.transcript: Must defeat Id to press on!

jp.text: イドを倒せねば先へは進めんか
jp.literal: If I can't defeat Id, can I even move forward?

709489774.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
709489774.transcript: Protect the Overseer! I can handle that!

jp.text: 彼女に魔物を近づけなければいいのだろう
jp.literal: I just have to keep the monsters away from her.

710565628.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
710565628.transcript: In your blade, I see reflected a caring heart.

jp.text: いい腕だ。日々の鍛錬がうかがえる。
jp.literal: Nice arm. I can see your daily training.
I won't let you get away!
I'll lead the way this time too!
I'm sorry to have caused you concern.

719666930.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
719666930.transcript: Protect the Overseer! I can handle that!

jp.text: 彼女に魔物を近づけなければいいのだろ？
jp.literal: I just have to keep the monsters away from her, right?

721793863.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
721793863.transcript: Yes, but that was back in the day.

jp.text: うん。クマ殺しという異名もあったな。そういえば。
jp.literal: Hmm. I heard you had the alias "Bear Slayer," come to think of it.

jp.text: ああ、俺も同じ心持ちだ
jp.literal: Huh? I'm the same way too!

727440837.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
727440837.transcript: The war is not won yet!

jp.text: まだまだここからだぞ！お前たち！
jp.literal: We're just getting started, you know!

jp.text: アースデトネーション！

jp.literal: Do I need to help you out?

730559530.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
730559530.transcript: You haven't even broken a sweat!

jp.text: まだまだ余裕がありそうだ
jp.literal: You still seem to have some room to spare.

730984800.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
730984800.transcript: None can stand against our combined force!

jp.text: 俺たちの力で圧倒するぞ！
jp.literal: We'll overwhelm them with our power!

734485676.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
734485676.transcript: Nature can be as terrible as she is charming.

jp.literal: So you're a master of manipulating thorns, are you?

jp.text: レッドデトネーション！
いつでも準備はできている

736858493.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
736858493.transcript: Remember the strategies we've learned along the way!

jp.text: 以前の戦いを思い出せ！動きに対応できるはずだ！
jp.literal: Remember the battles of old. We should be able to respond to their moves.

737067737.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
737067737.transcript: You aren't one for mercy, are you?

741580562.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
741580562.transcript: Zeta, keep your wits about you.

jp.literal: Zeta, don't let your guard down!

jp.text: うむ。決して誇ることなかれ。
jp.literal: Never let pride cloud your judgment.

jp.text: そうだな、今のはなかなかだったぞ。
jp.literal: That was quite something, wasn't it?

756239595.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
756239595.transcript: That's quite the fighting style you have. But will it be enough?

jp.text: 面白い術を使うものだな。だが
jp.literal: You've got some interesting tricks there. But...

758991463.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
758991463.transcript: The knight and the samurai, a dashing combination!

jp.text: ありがとう。いい連携だった
jp.literal: Thanks. That was a good link.
Well then, shall we head back?

760058065.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
760058065.transcript: The key is to give your opponents no quarter.

jp.text: 敵に攻撃の機会を与えないようにするのがコツだな。
jp.literal: The key is not giving the enemy an opening to attack.

762028636.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
762028636.transcript: Yes, it couldn't have gone better.

jp.text: すまないな。あとは任せてもらおうか。
jp.literal: I'm sorry. I'll leave the rest to you.

jp.text: ここに合わせるとは、尋常ではないな。
jp.literal: To meet here... this is most irregular.

jp.text: ありがとう、ランスロット

768059113.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
768059113.transcript: Dragon Slayer versus Dragon of Destruction. I didn't see that coming.

jp.text: 竜殺しの剣を、かの破壊の龍に向けることになるとはな。
jp.literal: To think I'd point the Dragon Slayer's sword toward the Dragon of Ruin...

773182692.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
773182692.transcript: I'd say our swords are about the same size, wouldn't you?

jp.text: 今のはシャルロッテ殿の気配りあってこその連携だったぞ。
jp.literal: That was only possible thanks to your kindness, Charlotte.

774909966.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
774909966.transcript: I should ask the same of your spearwork.

jp.text: ゼタの総実こそ相当なものだと思うぞ
jp.literal: Zeta's funeral is quite something, I'd say.

776808797.label: PL1100_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL1000
776808797.transcript: Wasn't my intention, yet here we are.

jp.text: そんなつもりはなかったんだが
jp.literal: I didn't mean to do that.

779051424.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
779051424.transcript: Your blade has seen many battles.

jp.text: ヨダルラーハ、素晴らしい技だ！

779058785.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
779058785.transcript: That's quite the fighting style you have. But will it be enough?

jp.text: 面白い術を使うものだな。だが
jp.literal: You've got some interesting tricks. But...

jp.text: おお、随分と成長したな
jp.literal: Huh. You've come a long way.

780347885.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
780347885.transcript: Stay on your guard! This battle isn't over yet!

jp.text: 引き続き仕掛ける！お前たちは警戒を！
jp.literal: I'll keep pressing the attack. You all stay alert.

781573967.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
781573967.transcript: And here I thought to say the same to you.

782530611.label: PL1100_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL0800_2
782530611.transcript: Rely on your allies a little more.

jp.literal: Leave the next one to me!

784987238.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
784987238.transcript: Feel the fang of the black dragon!

jp.text: 極龍のオアギトで神喰らカン！
jp.literal: With the Dragon's Agito, I'll crush you!

790649824.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
790649824.transcript: In truth, we're more alike than you know.

jp.text: まったく、お互い業が深い

795529771.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
795529771.transcript: I'll show you why they call me Dragon Slayer!

jp.text: ニューゴロシの本領発揮と行くか？
jp.literal: I'll go with the full power of New World Slayer.
Well then, shall we do this?

jp.text: 心配は無用だ、パーシヴァル。

797001806.label: PL1102_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0800_3
797001806.transcript: Good. Now, back into the fray.

jp.text: よし、背中は預けるぞ、ランスロット。
jp.literal: Alright. I'll leave my back to you, Lancelot.

803497928.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
803497928.transcript: It's been many years since I slayed that dragon.

jp.literal: What? You mean the old story?

804610411.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
804610411.transcript: Should've left your toys at home if you didn't want them broken!

jp.text: 大層な兵器だが、破壊する！
jp.literal: Such a magnificent weapon... I'll destroy it!

805744669.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
805744669.transcript: Once we put out this fire, all that's left is Lilith.

jp.text: ここを突破し、リリスの元へ急がねばな
jp.literal: I must break through here and hurry to Lilith.

806180469.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
806180469.transcript: We need only triumph once more!

jp.text: 相手にとって不足はない

810808043.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
810808043.transcript: You're the best marksman I've met.

811001775.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
811001775.transcript: My advice to you, generals—work on your coordination.

jp.text: 率直に言う。連携の練度が足りんのではないか、将軍。
jp.literal: Frankly, don't you think our coordination is lacking, General?

jp.text: みんな！こっちに来てくれ！

812522009.label: PL1100_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1000_3
812522009.transcript: Get behind me! I'll take the front guard!

jp.text: 無理をするな！俺が前に出る！
jp.literal: Don't overdo it! I'll go in front!

814292022.label: PL1100_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL0800
814292022.transcript: Fear not, I've suffered only scratches.

jp.text: 心配無用だ、ランスロット。傷は浅い。
jp.literal: No need to worry, Lancelot. It's just a scratch.

814754103.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
814754103.transcript: Captain, you're going to make me blush in sight of our enemies.

jp.text: まだ戦いが続いてる。気を抜くなよ。
jp.literal: The battle's not over yet. Don't let your guard down.

815815625.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish_1
815815625.transcript: With our powers combined, no force can stop us!

jp.text: 力を合わせれば、何倍にも増幅するものだ。
jp.literal: When combined, our power multiplies many times over.

815984572.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
815984572.transcript: Should've left your toys at home if you didn't want them broken!

jp.text: 大層な兵器だが、破壊する！
jp.literal: A mighty weapon... I'll destroy it!

819151396.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
819151396.transcript: You must ask your pack to take a bow as well.

jp.text: フェリとペットたちのおかげだな
jp.literal: It's thanks to you, Ferry, and the pets.

819494893.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
819494893.transcript: Our attacks appear to be landing.

jp.text: 攻撃が通じているようだな
jp.literal: Looks like my attacks are getting through.

822266736.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
822266736.transcript: Well then, what's our next act?

825695970.label: PL1102_vo_DUO_rescue2_B
825695970.transcript: This wasn't part of the plan.

jp.literal: I can't go with just one line.

jp.text: コオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオ

827570719.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
827570719.transcript: No wonder this man is a commander.

jp.text: なるほど。確かにやるようだな。
jp.literal: I see. You're definitely going to do it.

jp.text: ああ！存分に暴れさせてもらう！
jp.literal: Hah! I'll let you go wild!

jp.text: みんな！こっちに来てくれ！
ほおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおおお
ガランツァ将軍に続くぞ！

840478595.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
840478595.transcript: I would fight alongside you a thousand times over.

jp.text: よし！このまま押し切るぞ！
jp.literal: Alright! Let's push through like this!

843162912.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
843162912.transcript: Well, let's not keep destiny waiting, shall we?

jp.text: この勢いのまま、次に備えよ。
jp.literal: With this momentum, prepare for the next one.

843181466.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
843181466.transcript: He's still standing after that attack?

jp.literal: Even in the daytime, we fight.

843965661.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
843965661.transcript: What a nice view. I can see our victory from up here.

jp.text: ようやくここまで来たな。あと少しだ。
jp.literal: I've finally made it this far. Just a little more.

846217952.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
846217952.transcript: And I'd say you're amazed easily.

jp.text: これくらい、どうということはない。
jp.literal: I can't see any problem with this.

jp.text: チャアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア

854383480.label: PL1100_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL0900_2
854383480.transcript: You can't resist charging in by yourself, can you?

jp.text: ふっ、特攻するクセは相変わらずだな。
jp.literal: Hmph. Your habit of rushing in headfirst hasn't changed a bit.

859730945.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
859730945.transcript: Do you mean that in a positive sense?

jp.text: ふん、甲い被りすぎだぞ、ラカム。
jp.literal: You're getting too wrapped up in your armor, Rackam.

860315977.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
860315977.transcript: We shouldn't linger on trivial fights.

jp.literal: I have to hurry to the back.

860906564.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
860906564.transcript: I'd be interested in seeing more of your blade work when you aren't holding back.

jp.text: ふふっ。機嫌もそろそろ本気を出してはどうだ？
jp.literal: Heh. Even the gods should probably stop holding back.
Heh. Let's go with that attitude!

866877196.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
866877196.transcript: I'm quite good at covering my tracks.

jp.literal: Well then, what do you say?

jp.text: なあに、大した傷じゃない
jp.literal: What? It's not a big deal.

870229243.label: PL1102_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_1
870229243.transcript: With this blade, I shall teach them fear!

871456162.label: PL1100_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
871456162.transcript: Hah! This blade shall carve a path to success!

jp.text: ふん。我が刃で道を切り開く。
jp.literal: Hmph. I'll carve a path with my blade.
Huh? Let's go with a good mood.

jp.text: 俺も負けてはいられんな
jp.literal: I can't afford to lose either.

jp.text: パーシヴァル、お前が助けに来てくれたのか。

875541029.label: PL1100_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL1000_3
875541029.transcript: We should find you a proper challenge!

jp.text: さすがにこの程度はたやすいか
jp.literal: Even for me, this is too easy.

877400971.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
877400971.transcript: They'll crumble under our united assault!

jp.text: 今のような連携を維持しよう
jp.literal: Let's keep up this kind of teamwork.

878906673.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
878906673.transcript: I do hope I'm not menacing to you.

jp.text: もし、威圧感を与えてしまったのなら、すまない。
jp.literal: If I've given you a sense of oppression, I'm sorry.

879978288.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
879978288.transcript: You aren't one for mercy, are you?

880363779.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
880363779.transcript: Once we put out this fire, all that's left is Lilith!

jp.text: ここを突破し、リリスの元へ急がねばな。
jp.literal: I'll break through here and rush to Lilith's side!

jp.text: どうということはない
jp.literal: There's no such thing as "how to".

885287707.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
885287707.transcript: They weren't much to speak of.

jp.text: 大した相手ではないはずだ
jp.literal: He shouldn't be much of a challenge.

jp.text: ここは一旦下がるべきだ！
jp.literal: We should fall back for now!

jp.text: 見事だった、ランスロット。
jp.literal: That was a good one, Lancelot.

887189588.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
887189588.transcript: Hold the celebrations! We must make another push!

jp.text: まだだ！もう一度行くぞ！
jp.literal: Not yet! Let's go one more time!
Well then, shall we do this?

jp.text: みんな、いい連携だった
jp.literal: Everyone, that was a good link.

901277648.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
901277648.transcript: I would fight alongside you a thousand times over.

jp.text: よし！このまま押し切るぞ！
jp.literal: Alright! Let's push forward like this!

902081306.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
902081306.transcript: I think that went rather well.

902406631.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
902406631.transcript: Mountains and deserts couldn't stop us. What chance do you have?

jp.text: 何度立ち阻かろうとも同じことだ
jp.literal: No matter how many times I rise again, it's the same thing.

904609539.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
904609539.transcript: Well, I spend half my days on the battlefield.

jp.text: ……だてに視線は越えていないからな。

906964242.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
906964242.transcript: Well, I spend half my days on the battlefield.

jp.text: ……ふふふ。無駄に視線は越えていないからな。

907805314.label: PL1100_vo_DUO_buff_E_PL1000
907805314.transcript: Let's live up to your lofty expectations!

jp.text: お前らの期待に応えるとしよう

909584185.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
909584185.transcript: So much for an uneventful hike to the top.

jp.text: おとなしく登らせてくれはしないだろうな
jp.literal: I won't let you climb up so easily.

jp.text: 手加減無用ということだな

912730516.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
912730516.transcript: I think that went rather well.

jp.text: 心配をかけたな、ヴェイン。
jp.literal: I'm sorry to have caused you concern, Vane.

913765291.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
913765291.transcript: When one has no reason to fight, they've already lost.

jp.text: 意思なき攻撃など通用しない

jp.literal: I'll return to the front lines!

jp.text: はっはっは、大したものだ

917952644.label: PL1102_vo_ETC_lockon_2
917952644.transcript: Seems like we have no choice but to fight.

jp.text: ここは通してもらおうか

918027786.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
918027786.transcript: I'm quite good at covering my tracks.

jp.literal: Well then, what do you say?

jp.text: 相手の動きをよく見るんだ
ナラクルフォールダウン！

920484323.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
920484323.transcript: They weren't much to speak of.

jp.text: 大した相手ではないはずだ
jp.literal: He shouldn't be much of a challenge.

922937059.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
922937059.transcript: I wield my sword for the sake of the skies!

jp.text: 我が翼に、この空のために振るわん！
jp.literal: For my sword, and for this sky!

jp.text: ガンダゴウザ殿こそ、実に痛快だった。
jp.literal: Ghandagoza, you were truly a worthy opponent.
I'll cut through with this sword!

jp.text: フフ、この調子で行くぞ！
アークデトネーション！
お前たちを守ってみせる!

937213304.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
937213304.transcript: So long as we support one another, no foe can stop us!

jp.text: 共に支え合えば、勝てぬ敵などいない。
jp.literal: Together, we can overcome anything. There's no enemy we can't defeat.

939201353.label: PL1100_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
939201353.transcript: We've made them livid! Watch out!

jp.text: どうやら仕掛けてくるようだ
jp.literal: Looks like they're setting a trap.
I won't let you get away! Hah!

943521039.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
943521039.transcript: We've been thrust into a clash with titans!

jp.text: 互いの強弱をかけた戦いか

943758574.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
943758574.transcript: We've slain it once! We can slay it again!

jp.text: 以前と同じ要領で食らいつくんだ！
jp.literal: I'll crush you with the same power as before!

jp.text: はっはっは、大したものだ

945763320.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
945763320.transcript: This is chaotic! Stay close to me!

jp.text: 何センカ！俺から離れるんだ！
jp.literal: Nonsense! You're not getting away from me!

949222250.label: PL1102_vo_DUO_buff_C_PL1000
949222250.transcript: Lord of Flames, I accept your aid!

jp.text: 限定の力、活用させてもらう！
jp.literal: I'll make full use of my boundless power.

949695608.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
949695608.transcript: Who will be our next opponent?

jp.text: さあ、次の相手はどいつだ？
守備を固め、切り崩すぞ！
jp.literal: I'll solidify my defense and break through!

955579959.label: PL1100_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_C
955579959.transcript: The wolf fights hardest when its back's against the wall!

jp.text: 大規模な攻撃に巻き込まれないよう立ちまろ
jp.literal: Let's stand firm and avoid getting caught in that large-scale attack.

957681931.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
957681931.transcript: Truly, your swordplay is not of these skies.

jp.text: 一部のスキも見逃すな！
jp.literal: Don't overlook even a single opening!

958837971.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
958837971.transcript: And a few centuries has taught you much.

jp.text: ふふ。まだまだ鈍るような腕ではないぞ。
jp.literal: I'm not quite as weak as you think.

jp.text: 舐めてもらっては困る
jp.literal: I'll have you licking my boots!

961147653.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
961147653.transcript: They'll crumble under our united assault!

jp.text: 今のような連携を維持しよ
jp.literal: Let's keep up this kind of synergy.

jp.text: ありがとう。もう大丈夫だ。

jp.literal: I'm not going to let you get away with this!

jp.text: イド、お前も随分と元気そうだな。

964778053.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
964778053.transcript: Your blade is as cold and unerring as death.

jp.text: うん、恐ろしい立ちすじだ

970068431.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
970068431.transcript: Do what you must to avoid his reach!

jp.text: やつを勢いにのまれるな！
jp.literal: I can't be overwhelmed by his momentum!

970303893.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
970303893.transcript: No, it was our combination which led to victory.

jp.text: すべて合わせて見せようじゃないか
jp.literal: Let's show them everything we've got!

jp.text: ティアストロフィズム！
奇伝の拳あってこそだったな
jp.literal: It was only thanks to our clash of fists that we could reach this point.

jp.text: 次も頼りにさせてもらうぞ
jp.literal: I'll be counting on you again.

976269743.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
976269743.transcript: We make a rather good team.

976302046.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
976302046.transcript: Come on, everyone! Let's break a leg!

jp.text: アシシカトドカナイノナラアシカラタタクゾ
jp.literal: If I can't reach you with my fists, I'll kick you!
Heh heh... Did I surprise you?

979343379.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
979343379.transcript: The tide of battle flows in our favor!

jp.text: いい流れだ。今度こそは。
jp.literal: Good flow. This time for sure...

979459278.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
979459278.transcript: Don't make me laugh. No one believes in your twisted vision of salvation!

jp.text: 救済を謳い、異形となり果てるなど、小死！
jp.literal: I sing of salvation, and become a heretic. Show me!

jp.text: 舐めてもらっては困る！
jp.literal: I'll have you licking my boots!

981788254.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
981788254.transcript: It is a comforting thing to be part of a pack.

jp.text: フェリ、協力に感謝する
jp.literal: Ferry, thank you for your cooperation.

984898683.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
984898683.transcript: We will strike fast and strike hard.

jp.text: 了解だ。思う存分暴れさせてもらおう。
jp.literal: Understood. I'll let it run wild as much as I want.
Looks like you're stuck in ice.

986199256.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
986199256.transcript: You seem to be in a rather good mood.

jp.literal: I'm sorry. I'm glad you're okay.

988502939.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
988502939.transcript: Poor visibility can lead to death. Watch your flanks.

jp.text: 視界が悪い。周囲に警戒を。
jp.literal: My sight's poor. I'll shield you.

jp.text: おとしものをおかしする！

989493055.label: PL1102_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL1000_2
989493055.transcript: Let them bring their fury. I'm ready.

jp.text: ここから挽回させてもらおう
jp.literal: I'll let you handle the retreat from here.

990951911.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
990951911.transcript: We shouldn't linger on trivial fights.

jp.literal: I'll go all the way to the back.
I'll finish this with one move!

jp.text: 行く！攻撃の手を休めるな！
jp.literal: I can do it! I can rest my hand from attacking!

999916493.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
999916493.transcript: You should be proud of yourself, Io.

jp.literal: That was a great job, Io.

1000536622.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
1000536622.transcript: It is a comforting thing to be part of a pack.

jp.text: フェリ、協力に感謝する
jp.literal: Ferry, thank you for your cooperation.

jp.text: なあに？さして重くはない
jp.literal: What? This isn't heavy at all.

1001950781.label: PL1100_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_3
1001950781.transcript: I will not falter! Not with lives on the line!

jp.text: みんなの想い、無駄にはせん！
jp.literal: Everyone's will... won't go to waste!

1003433463.label: PL1102_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish_1
1003433463.transcript: With our powers combined, no force can stop us!

jp.text: 力を合わせれば、何倍にも増幅するものだ。
jp.literal: When combined, our power multiplies many times over.

jp.text: 見事な連携だ、お前たち。

1006272394.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
1006272394.transcript: What is my dragon blood reacting to?

jp.text: 銃の血が反応している

1006950849.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
1006950849.transcript: You must master your strength before it masters you.

jp.text: 心を強く持て。呑まれるなよ。
jp.literal: Keep your heart strong. Don't get swallowed up.

1010887015.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
1010887015.transcript: From the links we've forged flows boundless strength!

jp.text: 絆の力…心地よいものだな。
jp.literal: The power of bonds... it's a pleasant feeling.

jp.text: バオ、接しやすいのはローランド殿のおかげか
jp.literal: I can keep my guard up thanks to you, Roland.

1013548926.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
1013548926.transcript: Are you ready for another hunt?

1013694281.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
1013694281.transcript: Grynoth strikes me as a sinister weapon.

jp.text: バザラガ、お前もこの大群の闇に怯えてるのか？
jp.literal: The darkness of the Great Wyrm Grouurnos is bottomless?

1014985830.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
1014985830.transcript: Be careful where you step, everyone!

jp.text: 足場には気をつけてくれよ
助かったぞ、ランスロット
jp.literal: I'm glad I could save you, Lancelot.

jp.text: 座って、どうしたものか
お手並み拝見と行こうか
jp.literal: Shall we go see the waves?
You're gonna hold on to that?

1029730036.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
1029730036.transcript: We can't waste our time on you lot!

jp.text: 俺たちの相手ではない

1031504837.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
1031504837.transcript: It all comes down to this!

jp.text: 蹴りを付けようじゃないか
jp.literal: Let's put the finishing touches on this.
Heh. Let's go with that attitude!

1038520183.label: PL1100_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
1038520183.transcript: Hmph. We do not know defeat.

1039342388.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
1039342388.transcript: I'd be interested in seeing more of your blade work when you aren't holding back.

jp.text: ふふっ。機嫌もそろそろ本気を出してはどうだ？
jp.literal: Heh. The legend's about to get serious.

jp.text: 見事だった、ランスロット。

1040223030.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
1040223030.transcript: And a few centuries has taught you much.

jp.text: ふん。まだまだ鈍るような腕ではないぞ。
jp.literal: Hmph. I'm not some weakling yet.

1041898318.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
1041898318.transcript: Zeta, keep your wits about you.

jp.literal: Zeta, don't let your guard down!

jp.text: シュバルツ・ファング！

1042583181.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
1042583181.transcript: I've known you for many years, and still, you never cease to surprise me.

jp.text: おまえの力には驚かされるな

1044453367.label: PL1102_vo_ATK_ability_1_2
1044453367.transcript: Let our blades do the talking!

jp.literal: I'll cut you down with my sword!

1049227637.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
1049227637.transcript: May alchemy never be used for works of evil.

jp.literal: That was a splendid display of support.

1051819257.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
1051819257.transcript: Feel the fang of the black dragons!

jp.text: 北流の輪ぎとで神くらかん！
jp.literal: With the breath of the Frost Dragon, I'll crush you!

jp.text: カタリナ、このまま押し切るぞ！
jp.literal: I'll hold this firm and push through!

jp.text: 力だけが強さではない！

1054536871.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
1054536871.transcript: How long can you maintain your defenses?

jp.literal: How far can I protect you?

1056946222.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
1056946222.transcript: And I'd say you're amazed easily.

jp.text: これくらい、どうということはない
jp.literal: I can't say anything more than this.

1058944881.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
1058944881.transcript: Stay on your guard! This battle isn't over yet!

jp.text: 引き続き仕掛ける！お前たちは警戒を！
jp.literal: I'll keep pressing the attack. You all stay alert.

1059982950.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
1059982950.transcript: Be careful where you step, everyone!

jp.text: 足場には気をつけてくれよ

1061119342.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
1061119342.transcript: Have you always shouldered this power... this burden?

jp.text: その力…お前は何を背負っている
jp.literal: That power... What are you carrying?

jp.text: うん、この調子でいくぞ！
jp.literal: Hmph. I'll take it from here!

1066201277.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
1066201277.transcript: From the links we've forged, flows boundless strength!

jp.text: 絆の力。心地よいものだな。
jp.literal: The power of bonds... it's a pleasant feeling.

1066402154.label: PL1102_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
1066402154.transcript: We've made them livid! Watch out!

jp.text: どうやら仕掛けてくるようだ
jp.literal: Looks like they're setting a trap.

jp.text: 次も頼りにさせてもらうぞ

1067063847.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
1067063847.transcript: The knight and the samurai, a dashing combination!

jp.text: ありがとう。いい連携だった。
jp.literal: Thanks. That was a good link.

jp.text: お前たち、油断はするなよ
jp.literal: You guys, don't let your guard down.

jp.text: 道をあけてもらおうか

jp.literal: I won't let you get away with this!

7594968.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
7594968.transcript: Just how much of the battle can you follow?

jp.text: 味方の動きさえも読んで狙撃するか。
jp.literal: You're already anticipating your ally's moves to counterattack?

10374346.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
10374346.transcript: Perhaps because it was infused with lightning.

jp.text: 来撃との相乗効果だろうな
jp.literal: It's probably the synergy with the barrage.
So you're the one with the fangs... I see.

12181586.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
12181586.transcript: No, no, no, no. It was a team effort.

13467707.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
13467707.transcript: I think you've got the wrong idea.

jp.text: 参考にでもなったのならいいが
jp.literal: If it was of any use to you, then that's fine.

jp.text: 次も気を抜かずに攻めてくれ
jp.literal: Don't let up on the offense next time either.

38969366.label: PL1102_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
38969366.transcript: Hmph. It's not one I bear lightly.

jp.text: 誰がつけた名だったやら
jp.literal: Heh. Whoever gave it that name was a fool.

jp.text: ああ、このまま押し通す！
jp.literal: Hah! Let's push through like this!

47632762.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
47632762.transcript: Hmm. Is it magic that causes them to fly?

jp.text: ふん。剣を飛ばして戦うとはな。

49614539.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
49614539.transcript: Not the question we should be asking, is it?

jp.text: さって、それはどうかな？

50019801.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
50019801.transcript: Your brutality makes me pity our foes.

jp.text: さっきの攻撃、相手が気の毒になるほどだった。
jp.literal: That last attack was enough to make the enemy's eyes pop out.

51588256.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
51588256.transcript: Your brutality makes me pity our foes.

jp.text: さっきの攻撃、相手が気の毒になるほどだった
jp.literal: Your attack just now... it was enough to make the enemy's heart tremble.

56954742.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
56954742.transcript: You have my heartiest agreement, General Gallanza.

jp.text: ああ、見事だった。ガランツァ殿。

64638505.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
64638505.transcript: My sword... I vowed to wield it for my comrades.

jp.text: この力は仲間たちのために振るうと誓った
jp.literal: I swore to wield this power for the sake of my comrades.

68429998.label: PL1102_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
68429998.transcript: Perhaps because it was infused with lightning!

jp.text: ライゲキとの相乗効果だろうな
jp.literal: It's the combo effect with the barrage, right?
I'm as strong as I can be.

75313812.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
75313812.transcript: Surely I'm more mobile than that.

jp.text: 先陣は俺に任せておけ

77344579.label: PL1102_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
77344579.transcript: Certain foes warrant a heavy hand.

jp.text: 時には強引に攻めるのも有効か
jp.literal: Maybe a forceful assault is effective sometimes.

84494001.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
84494001.transcript: That was a superb exhibition of teamwork.

jp.text: よし。悪くない連携だったな。
jp.literal: Alright. That wasn't a bad link.

94984292.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
94984292.transcript: Heh heh heh... If you insist.

109500348.label: PL1102_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
109500348.transcript: Allow me to have first crack at the next one.

jp.text: ナルメア殿！次は俺が前に出よう！
jp.literal: Narmaya, I'll take the next one.
You've forced your way in, have you?

jp.text: はっ、教訓とさせてもらおう
jp.literal: Let me teach you a lesson.

125225547.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
125225547.transcript: Your chivalry is well reflected in your swordsmanship, Percival.

jp.text: 強き心音が映し出された。いい立ち筋だ。
jp.literal: A strong heart is reflected in your stance. Good form.

129760890.label: PL1102_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
129760890.transcript: I knew you wouldn't disappoint, Vane. Keep it up.

jp.text: いい追撃だった。次も頼むぞ、ヴェイン。
jp.literal: Nice follow-up. I'll leave the next one to you, Vane.

jp.text: ロゼッタ殿が花を添えてくれたおかげだな
jp.literal: Thanks to you, Rosetta, I was able to add the finishing touch.

130524743.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
130524743.transcript: I am ever at your service.

jp.literal: What? You're not even a parent.

jp.text: 戦撃に感謝する。紛らかにしたの。

162111908.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
162111908.transcript: There's taking initiative, and then there's reckless abandon.

jp.text: あまり前のめりになり過ぎるなよ
ベアトリクス、けがはないか？

176589600.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
176589600.transcript: There's a certain passion behind your strikes.

jp.text: フラウド殿の想いが伝わる一撃だった
jp.literal: It was a one-shot that conveyed Fraux's feelings.

180784467.label: PL1102_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
180784467.transcript: It was an honor to lend my sword to the Rose Queen.

jp.text: バラの女王にお力添えを賜り、光栄に存じます。
jp.literal: I am honored to serve the Rose Queen. It is my privilege.

190343558.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
190343558.transcript: Excellent. You've made that technique your own.

jp.text: なるほど。お前らしい技だ、ランスロット。
jp.literal: I see. That's quite a move for you, Lancelot.

204420323.label: PL1102_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
204420323.transcript: I've never fought with a spear like yours before.

jp.text: 今の連携、実に見事だった
jp.literal: That synergy just now... was truly magnificent.

227320153.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
227320153.transcript: You know what to do, Eustace!

jp.literal: Alright, let's prepare for the next one.

227388564.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
227388564.transcript: Wise. You wouldn't want Sword Sovereign Siegfried to steal your thunder.

jp.text: おお、では本気でその隙を狙ってみるか。なんてな。
jp.literal: Oh, then I'll aim for that seat for real. What do you say?

240079155.label: PL1102_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
240079155.transcript: Such impressive magic at your age!

jp.text: 理想的な立ち回りだった。頼りにさせてもらう。
jp.literal: It was the ideal positioning. I'll rely on you.

241100697.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
241100697.transcript: Hmph. I don't think you're applying yourself to the fullest, Seofon.

jp.text: うん、まだ本気には程遠いと見えるが。
jp.literal: Hmph. You still seem a ways off from being serious.

245612225.label: PL1100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
245612225.transcript: Then by your leave, shall I escort you to the front lines?

jp.text: ギョイ！僭越ではあるが、次はオレがエスコートを買って出よう。
jp.literal: Heh, I'm not a saint, but next time, I'll be the one escorting you.

jp.text: 不屈の精神、見習わねばな
jp.literal: I'll have to learn from your indomitable spirit.

251179890.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
251179890.transcript: Give my regards to the pack.

252219483.label: PL1100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
252219483.transcript: Unbridled alchemy is a terrifying sight, to say the least.

jp.text: 連禁術の真髄…恐ろしいものだ
jp.literal: The essence of alchemy... it's truly terrifying.

265785537.label: PL1102_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
